_metadata.scope: All ASSUMED/UNVERIFIED/UNKNOWN parameters in qta_full_sim.py and qta_manuscript_v4.tex. 111 entries (count recomputed at write time and verified by checker).
_metadata.rule: No parameter is VERIFIED in this system. All gates are at best CONDITIONAL. No PASS from assumed parameters.
_metadata.global_status: CONDITIONALLY DEFINED. BLOCKED. Physical feasibility is not established.
_metadata.tau_c_canonical_threshold: 292 µs (v3.3; combined SNR>=5 + eps_thermo<1% with pulse dephasing). Supersedes 27.7 µs (v3.0).
_metadata.C_contr_note: C_contr at 10 mK is CO-EQUAL BOTTLENECK with tau_c. Both UNKNOWN.
_metadata.Vespel_note: Vespel SP-22 REJECTED. Committed support: Kevlar 49 / G-10CR / OFHC Cu intercepts.
_metadata.cross_coupling_note: Cross-coupling framework REMOVED. Live cross-coupling references renamed to mode-local secondary thermal feedback.
_metadata.mode_separation_note: Mode B LCVD optics (E_pulse_A, f_rep_A, tau_pulse_A, spot_radius_A, eta_abs_A, precursor_species, deposition_yield_per_pulse_A, local_surface_temperature_A) are kept separate from Mode D NV readout optics (E_pulse_D, f_rep_D, eta_abs_D, T_peak_D, tau_recovery_D). Mode D gates D6/D7 use only the Mode D vector. Legacy gates A6 (Mode B processing)-A13 use only the Mode A vector. No gate mixes the two.
_metadata.IL14_note: Hardware interlock IL-14: LCVD_on AND helium_film_present = IMPOSSIBLE. Gate A14: He-3/He-4 film absent before Mode B Processing.
_metadata.rtb_jt_optional_cooling_plant_note: RTB/JT is an optional upstream cooling plant only (4 K / shield / cryobaffle / Mode B dump). NOT a 10 mK cooler. NOT selected/installed/validated. Cannot unlock PASS. Baseline DESIGN_OPTION = 4 modules; redundant/derated DESIGN_OPTION = 8 modules.
_metadata.entry_count_note: Total parameter entries excluding _metadata = 111. Recomputed at write time; consistency checker verifies match.

G_eff.source: Kapitza model alpha_K×A×T³; Ag sinter NOT fabricated
G_eff.required_validation: Fabricate Ag sinter (45 cm²); step-response thermometry
G_eff.name: G_eff

tau_c.source: Fermi-liquid analogy from graphite; NOT measured on F-diamond
tau_c.required_validation: He-3 Ramsey on F-diamond at 10 mK
tau_c.notes: CANONICAL THRESHOLD: 292 µs (v3.3). CO-EQUAL BOTTLENECK with C_contr. Dominant MC failure (66.2%).
tau_c.name: tau_c

C_contr_10mK.source: Room-T value 0.10 ASSUMED; NOT measured at 10 mK
C_contr_10mK.required_validation: ODMR at 10 mK on this sample
C_contr_10mK.notes: CO-EQUAL BOTTLENECK with tau_c. If C_contr=0, detection fails regardless of tau_c.
C_contr_10mK.name: C_contr_10mK

eta_abs.source: Order-of-magnitude estimate from NV absorption cross-section
eta_abs.name: eta_abs

T2s.source: Literature range for near-surface NV in CVD diamond
T2s.required_validation: Ramsey in cryostat on this sample
T2s.name: T2s

d_NV.source: Ion implantation design target (SRIM-2013); not measured post-implant
d_NV.required_validation: SIMS or PL depth measurement post-implant
d_NV.notes: Signal scales as d^-6; 2x depth = 64x signal loss.
d_NV.name: d_NV

n_s.source: He-3 monolayer coverage at T_F~1K on graphite (analogy)
n_s.notes: Sticking coefficient on F-diamond UNKNOWN. Graphite analogy is INDIRECT.
n_s.name: n_s

S_vib.required_validation: In situ PSD measurement at NV position
S_vib.notes: NOT measured at NV position in this setup.
S_vib.name: S_vib

P_mw.source: Estimated from room-T source + estimated cable losses; not measured at base
P_mw.required_validation: Directional coupler at base; Rabi calibration
P_mw.name: P_mw

alpha_K.notes: NOT measured for this specific Ag/diamond interface. [status normalized from LITERATURE_BOUND: literature bounds the value but not the exact system claim]
alpha_K.name: alpha_K

s_H2.source: Sticking coefficient for H2 on clean surfaces (not F-diamond specific)
s_H2.required_validation: Measurement on F-diamond at millikelvin temperatures
s_H2.name: s_H2

QCM_noise_floor.source: Sub-0.1 Hz stability required; QCM NOT installed
QCM_noise_floor.notes: He-3 monolayer shift ≈0.09 Hz requires sub-0.1 Hz stability.
QCM_noise_floor.name: QCM_noise_floor

f_rep_D.name: f_rep_D
f_rep_D.required_validation: Measure actual rep rate at sample
f_rep_D.notes: Mode D NV readout rep rate. Period = 5 ms. Separate from Mode B f_rep_A.

eta_abs_D.name: eta_abs_D
eta_abs_D.notes: Mode D NV readout absorption coefficient. Separate from Mode B eta_abs_A.

T_peak_D.name: T_peak_D
T_peak_D.notes: Mode D NV readout cumulative pulse heating. Sim reports 673 mK from 200 Hz operation.

tau_recovery_D.name: tau_recovery_D
tau_recovery_D.notes: Mode D NV readout thermal recovery time.

IL14_LCVD_helium_interlock_status.name: IL14_LCVD_helium_interlock_status
IL14_LCVD_helium_interlock_status.required_validation: Install + verify IMPOSSIBLE state cannot be reached
IL14_LCVD_helium_interlock_status.notes: Hardware interlock IL-14: LCVD_on AND He_present = IMPOSSIBLE. [directness normalized from N/A: directness not applicable to this entry]

RTB_JT_module_count_baseline.notes: Baseline optional upstream cooling-plant scenario; not selected/installed/validated; must be sized from N_modules = ceil((P_ModeA_dump + P_parasitic + P_margin) * safety_factor / P_lift_per_module_derated)

RTB_JT_target_stage.value: 4 K / shield / cryobaffle / Mode B dump stage
RTB_JT_target_stage.notes: Upstream stage only. NOT 10 mK cooling; NOT a replacement for dilution refrigeration.

RTB_JT_per_module_lift_curve.notes: Vendor lift curve at actual target stage temperature and integration configuration.
RTB_JT_per_module_lift_curve.required_validation: Vendor lift curve at actual target stage and integration condition.

RTB_JT_derated_lift_per_module.notes: Derate vendor curve for vibration isolation, thermal links, duty cycle, integration losses.

RTB_JT_total_derated_lift.notes: Computed only after per-module derated lift is known.
RTB_JT_total_derated_lift.required_validation: Derived from per-module values once measured.

RTB_JT_vibration_spectrum.notes: Vibration PSD at QTA sample/optical path/Mode D sensitive interfaces.
RTB_JT_vibration_spectrum.required_validation: Measure vibration at sample stage with RTB/JT operating.

RTB_JT_heat_rejection.notes: Vendor electrical + thermal rejection data; site facility load.
RTB_JT_heat_rejection.required_validation: Vendor compressor/controller spec; facility heat-rejection envelope.

RTB_JT_electrical_power.notes: Vendor drive electronics / compressor / controller spec.

RTB_JT_EMI_coupling.required_validation: EMI measurement at NV readout and microwave-drive bandwidths.

RTB_JT_thermal_link_conductance.notes: Conductance from RTB/JT cold head to shield/dump/baffle stage.
RTB_JT_thermal_link_conductance.required_validation: Step-response or steady-state measurement after integration.

RTB_JT_ModeD_isolation.notes: Demonstrate RTB/JT operation does NOT increase Mode D thermal, vibration, RF, magnetic, or optical noise above budget.
RTB_JT_ModeD_isolation.required_validation: Mode D NV ODMR/Ramsey baseline with RTB/JT on vs off; thermal/vibration/EMI/optical comparison.
